title: Telegram node fails due to ECONNRESET errors
symptom: The Telegram 'Send Message' node fails intermittently with ECONNRESET errors when receiving input from a RAG Agent node. This leads to dropped connections and hangs during execution.
applies_when: Receiving input from RAG Agent node
not_this_if: Telegram node works with other nodes like Set node
root_cause: The ECONNRESET errors were caused by network instability in the proxy setup used for outbound HTTPS requests to the OpenAI API. The RAG Agent's resource usage exposed weaknesses in the proxy configuration, leading to dropped connections.
fix_steps: Re-architect the proxy setup to use a more robust solution like Privoxy
Configure n8n to use the new proxy with HTTP_PROXY/HTTPS_PROXY environment variables
Test the workflow to ensure reliability
agent_instruction: Implement a more stable proxy solution and configure n8n to use it.
